titleStmt.title: SII 26.324: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 324. (A.R. No. 306 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº [Sundara]-pāṇḍyadēva (II): Year 2 Mithuna (Āṉī) śu. 3, Sunday, Pūśam = 1277 A.D., June 6.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of which (2/3) was made by Kuḷattuḻāṉ Tulaiyādaśelvaṉ Māriyappiḷḷai alias Śiṉattaraiyar and (1/3) was made by his younger brother Aṟamāṇḍai, of two villages called Oṭṭaṅgāḍu and Śōṟaṉtiruttu, purchased by the above-mentioned persons from the ūr of Perumpēḍu in Māgaṇūr-nāḍu in Śeṅgāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam. The gift-villages, from which the previously granted dēvadāna and tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands were excluded, were granted as dēvadāna to the temple of the god Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Tirukkachchūr. It is stated that from the date of the inscription the incomes, etc., from these villages were to be given to the temple trustees and this was probably attested to by Pañchanadivāṇaṉ Aruṇagirip-perumāḷ Nīlagaṅgaraiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvimuṉṉāka tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī
ṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 mituṉanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritikaiyum nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamai
yum peṟṟa pūcattunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūrkoṭṭattuc cāttūr
nāṭṭu tarmapurattu kuḷattuḻāṉ tulaiyāta celvaṉ māriyappiḷḷaiyāṉa ciṉattaraiyar mu
ṉṟu kūṟiṭṭa Irukūṟum Ivar tampi Aṟamāṇṭai Oru kūṟumāka ceṅkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu mā
kaṇūr nāṭṭup perumpeṭṭu Ūravar pakkal vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya Oṭṭaṅkāṭu coṟa
ṉtiruttu Uḷpaṭa nāṟpāṟkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa viḷainilattilum kollai nilattilum
tūṇi nilattevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam nilam nikki Ellātaram tirukkaccūr Uṭai
yār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉārkkut tevatāṉamāka Iṭṭom pa
ñcanativāṇaṉ Aruṇakirip perumāḷ nilakaṅkarayaṉeṉ Iṉṉāḷ mutal
Ikkoyil tāṉattārkku Eṟakaṭamai kuṭimai pokkaṟuppate Ippaṭikku Ivai
nilakaṅkarayaṉ Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.324 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
